name: ResultME

values.name: andThen
values.comment:
Chain together a sequence of computations that may fail. This is identical
to `Result.andThen`.
values.type: (a -> ResultME.ResultME err b) -> ResultME.ResultME err a -> ResultME.ResultME err b

values.name: combine2
values.comment:
Combines 2 `ResultME`s together. If any of them have errors all the errors
will be gathered. Otherwise the supplied function will be used to combine the
result values as `Ok`.
values.type: (a -> b -> c) -> ResultME.ResultME err a -> ResultME.ResultME err b -> ResultME.ResultME err c

values.name: combine3
values.comment:
Combines 3 `ResultME`s together. If any of them have errors all the errors
will be gathered. Otherwise the supplied function will be used to combine the
result values as `Ok`.
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d) -> ResultME.ResultME err a -> ResultME.ResultME err b -> ResultME.ResultME err c -> ResultME.ResultME err d

values.name: combine4
values.comment:
Combines 4 `ResultME`s together. If any of them have errors all the errors
will be gathered. Otherwise the supplied function will be used to combine the
result values as `Ok`.
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> ResultME.ResultME err a -> ResultME.ResultME err b -> ResultME.ResultME err c -> ResultME.ResultME err d -> ResultME.ResultME err e

values.name: combine5
values.comment:
Combines 6 `ResultME`s together. If any of them have errors all the errors
will be gathered. Otherwise the supplied function will be used to combine the
result values as `Ok`.
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f) -> ResultME.ResultME err a -> ResultME.ResultME err b -> ResultME.ResultME err c -> ResultME.ResultME err d -> ResultME.ResultME err e -> ResultME.ResultME err f

values.name: combineApply
values.comment:
Combines 2 `ResultME`s together. If any of them have errors all the errors
will be gathered. Otherwise the function supplied in the second one will be
applied to the first, to produce the result value as `Ok`.
values.type: ResultME.ResultME e a -> ResultME.ResultME e (a -> b) -> ResultME.ResultME e b

values.name: combineDict
values.comment:
Combines all errors in a `Dict` of `ResultME`s. All errors will
be gathered in the case where there are any errors, otherwise a `Dict`
of the result values will be returned as `Ok`.
values.type: Dict.Dict comparable (ResultME.ResultME err v) -> ResultME.ResultME err (Dict.Dict comparable v)

values.name: combineList
values.comment:
Combines all errors in a `List` of `ResultME`s. All errors will
be gathered in the case where there are any errors, otherwise a `List`
of the result values will be returned as `Ok`.
values.type: List.List (ResultME.ResultME err a) -> ResultME.ResultME err (List.List a)

values.name: combineNonempty
values.comment:
Combines all errors in a `Nonempty` list of `ResultME`s. All errors will
be gathered in the case where there are any errors, otherwise a `Nonempty` list
of the result values will be returned as `Ok`.
values.type: List.Nonempty.Nonempty (ResultME.ResultME err a) -> ResultME.ResultME err (List.Nonempty.Nonempty a)

values.name: error
values.comment: Produces a `ResultME` from a single error.

values.name: errors
values.comment: Produces a `ResultME` from a list of errors.
values.type: err -> List.List err -> ResultME.ResultME err a

values.name: flatten
values.comment: Flattens the structure if one `ResultME` is nested inside another.
values.type: ResultME.ResultME err (ResultME.ResultME err a) -> ResultME.ResultME err a

values.name: fromResult
values.comment: Turns a `Result` into `ResultME` with one error.
values.type: Result.Result err a -> ResultME.ResultME err a

values.name: map
values.comment: Applies a function to the result value in a `ResultME`, if there is one.
values.type: (a -> b) -> ResultME.ResultME err a -> ResultME.ResultME err b

values.name: mapError
values.comment: Applies a function to the error in a `ResultME`, if there is one.
values.type: (x -> y) -> ResultME.ResultME x a -> ResultME.ResultME y a
